name: Santana Beach Club & Restaurant
howToBook: Website event form, email, or IG DM
whyFit: Mixes DJ nights with live bands. Offer weekday sunset sessions (Mon/Tue/Thu) when no DJs are scheduled. Family-run since 2009.

name: Yazoo Summer Bliss
whyFit: Boho beach vibe, full moon parties with live music on sand. Arrive early season to pitch.

name: Rum Bar Naxos
howToBook: Walk in — owner Yiannis personally curates music
whyFit: Eclectic venue (blues, jazz, reggae) with harbor sunset views. Short demo video wins here.

name: Sativa Café & Live Music Bar
location: Old Town Market Street, Parikia, Paros
whyFit: Best genre fit in Cyclades — purpose-built live music venue. Lounge, funk, reggae, electronic. Dreamy interior courtyard. Propose early evening set (7-9 PM).

name: Crios Beach Bar & Restaurant
whyFit: Upscale boho-chic, brand emphasizes mindfulness and waves. New venue (2024) still building identity — receptive to unique acts.

name: BeBop Bar Paros
whyFit: One of few Cycladic bars cultivating a listening atmosphere. Jazz-friendly, sunset views. Perfect for steel tongue drum aperitivo sets.

name: Old Captain Bar
whyFit: Sifnos stalwart. The island attracts food/culture tourists who appreciate world music. Bars here often book multi-week residencies.

name: Palmira Beach Bar Sifnos
whyFit: Sifnos's most iconic beach bar since 2005. Chill-out but upbeat tagline. Pitch ongoing weekly sunset sessions.

name: Soros Beach Antiparos
whyFit: Bohemian-luxury Veuve Clicquot venue. Already features sax performers alongside DJs — steel tongue drum sunset session would be novel.

name: Ammos & Ilios Beach Bar
whyFit: One of Chania's most popular beach bars. Target the sunset aperitivo window (6-8 PM) before the DJ takes over.

name: Liokalyvo Beach Club
howToBook: Email — they have an event planning team
whyFit: Harmonizing your soul with the sounds of the waves. Tulum-inspired venue on one of Europe's top beaches.

name: Cretan Malia Park
whyFit: Earthy and boho aesthetic. Propose sunset soundscape pairing ambient music with their wine tasting events.

name: Ekies All Senses Resort
whyFit: Barefoot luxury with treehouse restaurant. Renovated 2025 — likely refreshing entertainment lineup.

name: Arillas Soundgarden
whyFit: Self-described mecca of ecstatic dance. 1200sqm olive grove garden. They book artists like Adrian Atma and Yemanjo — exactly FLUTUR's genre.

name: Ecstatic Radiance Greece
whyFit: Founder Mridu is one of the pillars of Ecstatic Dance in Greece. They value sound healing and gong baths — RAV Vast is natural match.

name: Casa Cook Rhodes
whyFit: Multi-property brand — getting into one Casa Cook could open their entire Mediterranean portfolio.

name: Chiringuito Ohana
whyFit: Música en directo casi todos los días. Hippie/bohemian dune setting. EXPLICITLY AVOIDS reggaeton — programs world music, acoustic, organic sounds.

name: Chiringuito El Pez Limón
whyFit: Famous for conciertos al atardecer (sunset concerts). Has hosted world music artists.

name: Chiringuito La Luna
whyFit: Explicitly advertises free sunset performances from 20:00. Owner Antonio is music-focused and produces Afro House.

name: Hurricane Beach Bar Tarifa
whyFit: Elegant setting under pine trees with views of Morocco. They book quality over quantity.

name: Grupo Potito Beach Club
whyFit: Professional operation with multiple venues. Deep roots in world/fusion music.

name: Chiringuito El Hornillero
whyFit: On the last virgin beach of the Costa del Sol. Lists música en directo as specialty. Authentic, intimate, lower competition.

name: Rincón del Sol Nerja
whyFit: Premium beach club. Asian-fusion concept means they appreciate world music influences.

name: La Siesta Javea
howToBook: IG DM or Guest Experience team via website
whyFit: Forbes-listed as one of Spain's best chiringuitos. 52K followers. Bohemian-luxe with Balinese beds and hammocks.

name: The Beach House Javea
whyFit: Repsol Solete-awarded. Ibiza meets Morocco decor with Bedouin tent feel.

name: Xiringuito X Costa Brava
location: Playa de la Rubina, Costa Brava
whyFit: Since 1996, THE musical chiringuito of Costa Brava. Located in Aiguamolls Natural Park.

name: Blue Bar Formentera
whyFit: Iconic 30+ year-old hippie beach bar. Cosmic, bohemian ethos. Monday is the designated live slot.

name: Es Xiringuito Ibiza
whyFit: Genres (tropical, bossa, chill out, jazz) match FLUTUR exactly. Genuine chiringuito, not a mega-club.

name: Can Jordi Blues Station
location: Ibiza Town to San José Road, Ibiza
howToBook: Walk in or Ibiza Spotlight listing
whyFit: Local legend — countryside grocery store/bar hosting live music. Intimate, authentic, beloved by residents.

name: Dreamsea Mediterranean
whyFit: 14 camps worldwide — securing one could lead to multi-venue touring across Portugal, France, Spain.

name: Nautic Almata Camping
whyFit: Separated Beach Club = dedicated evening music venue. Bay of Roses sunset views.

name: Sunset Café Capilungo
location: Capilungo (Marina di Alliste), Ionian coast, Salento
whyFit: Most beautiful sunset in Salento. Wooden-deck setting on rocks over the Ionian. Approach April/May.

name: XXL Music Bistrot
whyFit: Their identity IS live music — it's in the name. Nearly nightly AperiLive events. Diverse acts (jazz, funk, Latin).

name: Canneto Beach — The Belvedere
location: Ionian coast between Taranto and Lecce
whyFit: Panoramic cocktail bar, Japanese cuisine. Frame pitch around acoustic pairing with aperitivo.

name: Belvedere Music Beach
whyFit: Music is literally in the name. DJs - Live Music Shows - Private Events.

name: Petra Nera
location: Torre San Giovanni, Ionian coast, Salento
whyFit: Heart of Salento tourism. Pair with Sunset Café Capilungo for an Ionian coast mini-tour.

name: Lido Kalé Cora
location: Marina di Melendugno, Adriatic coast, Salento
whyFit: Special focus on live music with exceptional artists. Adriatic coast = less competition.

name: La Casa degli Uccellini
whyFit: IDEAL. Traditional stone aia under the stars, olive groves. Pitch Suoni della Terra concept. Opens doors to entire Valle d'Itria masseria circuit.

name: Masseria Tenuta Flora Maria
whyFit: Poolbar overlooking vineyard under starry sky. Already has Salento folk — world music twist would be fresh.

name: Agriturismo Terra di Lizia
whyFit: Has hosted international jazz/world musicians (e.g., Brad Linde). Cena e musica dal vivo is established format. Propose multi-night residency.

name: Masseria Amastuola
whyFit: Terrazza dining overlooking vineyards. Pitch Wine & Sound evening combining tastings with ambient performance.

name: Note di Vino
whyFit: Built on the marriage of wine and music — pairs musical genres with wine tastings. Start by attending a jam session.

name: Mamma Elvira Enoteca
howToBook: Meet owner Andrea in person (6-8:30 PM) or website form
whyFit: 250+ wines, Baroque stone setting, ~50 seats. Andrea values collaboration and personal connection.

name: Maljk Beach Club
whyFit: Cefalù's most famous beach venue. Balinese-style thatched pavilion. Growing scene, less competition than Taormina.

name: Pub Troubadour 1982
whyFit: Operating since 1982. Intimate courtyard in quiet Ortigia alley. Hidden gem, not tourist trap.

name: Mammut Wine Bar
whyFit: Caffè Concerto tradition. Over-30 crowd passionate about wine and music. Show up Friday to scout, then pitch.

name: Resort Le Saline — Malì Beach Bar
whyFit: PERHAPS THE SINGLE BEST-MATCHED VENUE ON THIS ENTIRE LIST. They explicitly seek acoustic performers for sunset sessions. Private sandy beach, boutique villa setting.

name: Camping Cala Ginepro
whyFit: Plethora of concerts and live music in piazza — rock, blues, Italian, country, Sardinian folk. Diverse programming = world music fits naturally.

name: Sunset Beach Club Tropea
whyFit: Postcard-perfect location with views of Aeolian Islands. Tropea's live music scene is smaller = less competition.

name: Laundry Lounge Sagres
whyFit: EXCELLENT FIT. Yoga mornings, surf culture, organic food, blues/reggae/bossa live music. Reviews: best live music in Sagres.

name: Three Little Birds Sagres
whyFit: Surfers, travelers, conscious-living crowd. Combine with Laundry Lounge for Sagres mini-residency.

name: Stevie Ray's Music Bar Lagos
whyFit: Lonely Planet's best live-music bar in town. International artists from Amsterdam to Mozambique. Fine wines, candlelit, two-level.

name: Gigi's Bar Quinta do Lago
howToBook: Quinta do Lago entertainment team with press kit
whyFit: Reached by crossing long wooden bridge over lagoon. Pitch specifically for Sunset Sessions.

name: Julia's Beach Bar
location: Praia do Garrão, between Vale do Lobo and Quinta do Lago
whyFit: Sunday lunchtime sessions are the signature slot. Relaxed, independently run.

name: O Cais Restaurant & Wine Bar
whyFit: Beautiful riverside setting, ancient Roman bridge backdrop. Inland = away from beach party scene, culturally-inclined crowd.

name: Ohai Nazaré Outdoor Resort
whyFit: Pine forest glamping with surf crowd. Portugal's growing glamping scene.

name: Central Park Club Hvar
whyFit: BEST FIT IN CROATIA. Live music is the main focus per Time Out Croatia. Need musicians constantly. 85-seat venue with terrace.

name: Valentino Cocktail & Champagne Bar
location: Ul. Sv. Križa 28, Rovinj old town, Croatia
whyFit: The Café del Mar of Croatia. Guests sit on golden pillows on rocks at water's edge. Featured in National Geographic.

name: Beach Bar Rovinj (Borik)
whyFit: Live music most nights per TripAdvisor. Extremely friendly owner. Great sunset backdrop.

name: Circolo Bar Rovinj
whyFit: Best off-season option in Rovinj. Local favorite. Combine with Valentino/Beach Bar for high-season.

name: Marvlvs Library Jazz Bar
whyFit: CULT venue. Ancient stone walls, library shelves. Bridges literature and music with style.

name: Ecstatic Dance Croatia
whyFit: Founder Indra's style — mystical atmospheres + ethnic elements — remarkably similar to FLUTUR's sound. Growing community = easier entry.
